metadata.name: Manage Rebalancing of a Bike Share System

description: Data shows that all bike share docks in a residential area are full, while docks in the downtown area are empty. An operator must rebalance the system.

nodes.task_description: Review the bike share system dashboard and identify the stations with 0% and 100% availability.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the imbalance in the system.

nodes.task_description: Generate a work order for the rebalancing crew.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a task for the field team.

nodes.task_description: Assign the crew a task to pick up bikes from the full stations and drop them off at the empty stations.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent dispatches the crew with specific instructions.
